title: Conduct field surveillance for a biosecurity emergency response
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct field surveillance for a biosecurity emergency response demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for surveillance activities

pcs.text: Receive and confirm information on incursion with Operations Manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive and confirm information on incursion with Operations Manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive and confirm information on incursion with Operations Manager.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm proposed surveillance activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm proposed surveillance activities.

pcs.text: Clarify legal implications and powers of authority with Operations Manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify legal implications and powers of authority with Operations Manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify legal implications and powers of authority with Operations Manager.

pcs.text: Identify, select and prepare resources required to undertake surveillance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, select and prepare resources required to undertake surveillance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, select and prepare resources required to undertake surveillance.

pcs.text: Notify stakeholders of site visit and legal obligations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify stakeholders of site visit and legal obligations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify stakeholders of site visit and legal obligations.

pcs.text: Decontaminate equipment and resources according to site biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Decontaminate equipment and resources according to site biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Decontaminate equipment and resources according to site biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and select and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and select and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and select and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for surveillance activities

elements.title: Conduct and finalise surveillance activities

pcs.text: Identify signs of emergency disease or pest at sites according to surveillance plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify signs of emergency disease or pest at sites according to surveillance plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify signs of emergency disease or pest at sites according to surveillance plan.

pcs.text: Collect samples for a diagnosis according to biosecurity standards and protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect samples for a diagnosis according to biosecurity standards and protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect samples for a diagnosis according to biosecurity standards and protocols.

pcs.text: Handle, package and dispatch diagnostic samples according to biosecurity standards and protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle, package and dispatch diagnostic samples according to biosecurity standards and protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle, package and dispatch diagnostic samples according to biosecurity standards and protocols.

pcs.text: Contain emergency disease or pest in a timely manner according to authorised information from control centre and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Contain emergency disease or pest in a timely manner according to authorised information from control centre and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Contain emergency disease or pest in a timely manner according to authorised information from control centre and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Collect information for managing emergency disease or pest outbreak and report results to operations manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect information for managing emergency disease or pest outbreak and report results to operations manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect information for managing emergency disease or pest outbreak and report results to operations manager.

pcs.text: Provide directions for stakeholders to follow according to control centre instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide directions for stakeholders to follow according to control centre instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide directions for stakeholders to follow according to control centre instructions.

pcs.text: Decontaminate personnel, equipment and vehicles according to biosecurity standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Decontaminate personnel, equipment and vehicles according to biosecurity standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Decontaminate personnel, equipment and vehicles according to biosecurity standards.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
